'''鈭歞h-th-l''' ('''kadhathal''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hilch|hilch]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-th-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hilch|hilch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-th-l
|-
! Lemma
| kadhathal
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhathal|thidhathal]] || [[word:jidhathal|jidhathal]] || [[word:shidhathal|shidhathal]] || [[word:kidhathal|kidhathal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhathal|thuthudhathal]] || [[word:jujudhathal|jujudhathal]] || [[word:shushudhathal|shushudhathal]] || [[word:kukudhathal|kukudhathal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhathal|thudhathal]] || [[word:judhathal|judhathal]] || [[word:shudhathal|shudhathal]] || [[word:kudhathal|kudhathal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhathal|thudhathal]] || [[word:judhathal|judhathal]] || [[word:shudhathal|shudhathal]] || [[word:kudhathal|kudhathal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhathal|thedhathal]] || [[word:jedhathal|jedhathal]] || [[word:shedhathal|shedhathal]] || [[word:kedhathal|kedhathal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhathal|thothodhathal]] || [[word:jojodhathal|jojodhathal]] || [[word:shoshodhathal|shoshodhathal]] || [[word:kokodhathal|kokodhathal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhathal|thodhathal]] || [[word:jodhathal|jodhathal]] || [[word:shodhathal|shodhathal]] || [[word:kodhathal|kodhathal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhathal|thodhathal]] || [[word:jodhathal|jodhathal]] || [[word:shodhathal|shodhathal]] || [[word:kodhathal|kodhathal]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhathal|dhathal]] || [[word:dhathal|dhathal]] || [[word:dhathal|dhathal]] || [[word:dhathal|dhathal]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhathal|dhathal]] || [[word:dhathal|dhathal]] || [[word:dhathal|dhathal]] || [[word:dhathal|dhathal]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhathal|dhathal]] || [[word:dhathal|dhathal]] || [[word:dhathal|dhathal]] || [[word:dhathal|dhathal]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhathal|dhathal]] || [[word:dhathal|dhathal]] || [[word:dhathal|dhathal]] || [[word:dhathal|dhathal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dhathal|th忙dhathal]] || [[word:j忙dhathal|j忙dhathal]] || [[word:sh忙dhathal|sh忙dhathal]] || [[word:k忙dhathal|k忙dhathal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhathal|thathadhathal]] || [[word:jajadhathal|jajadhathal]] || [[word:shashadhathal|shashadhathal]] || [[word:kakadhathal|kakadhathal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhathal|thadhathal]] || [[word:jadhathal|jadhathal]] || [[word:shadhathal|shadhathal]] || [[word:kadhathal|kadhathal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhathal|thadhathal]] || [[word:jadhathal|jadhathal]] || [[word:shadhathal|shadhathal]] || [[word:kadhathal|kadhathal]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadhathal|shadhathal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadhathal|goshadhathal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadhathal|gokishadhathal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadhathaln眉|shadhathaln眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadhathalnkn眉|goshadhathalnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhathaln眉|gokishadhathaln眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadhathalsh毛|shadhathalsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadhathalnksh毛|goshadhathalnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadhathalsh毛|gokishadhathalsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhathalro|shadhathalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhathalnkro|goshadhathalnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhathalro|gokishadhathalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhathalmu|shadhathalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhathalnkmu|goshadhathalnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhathalmu|gokishadhathalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadhathalsher|shadhathalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadhathalnksher|goshadhathalnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadhathalsher|gokishadhathalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadhathalng|shadhathalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadhathalnkng|goshadhathalnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadhathalng|gokishadhathalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadhathalya|shadhathalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadhathalnkya|goshadhathalnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadhathalya|gokishadhathalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadhathalyam|shadhathalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadhathalnkyam|goshadhathalnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadhathalyam|gokishadhathalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhathaln眉sh毛|shadhathaln眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhathalnkn眉sh毛|goshadhathalnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhathaln眉sh毛|gokishadhathaln眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhathaln眉ro|shadhathaln眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhathalnkn眉ro|goshadhathalnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhathaln眉ro|gokishadhathaln眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhathaln眉mu|shadhathaln眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhathalnkn眉mu|goshadhathalnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhathaln眉mu|gokishadhathaln眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhathalsh毛n眉|shadhathalsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhathalnksh毛n眉|goshadhathalnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhathalsh毛n眉|gokishadhathalsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhathalsh毛ro|shadhathalsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhathalnksh毛ro|goshadhathalnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhathalsh毛ro|gokishadhathalsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhathalsh毛mu|shadhathalsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhathalnksh毛mu|goshadhathalnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhathalsh毛mu|gokishadhathalsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhathalron眉|shadhathalron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhathalnkron眉|goshadhathalnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhathalron眉|gokishadhathalron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhathalrosh毛|shadhathalrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhathalnkrosh毛|goshadhathalnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhathalrosh毛|gokishadhathalrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhathalromu|shadhathalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhathalnkromu|goshadhathalnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhathalromu|gokishadhathalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhathalmun眉|shadhathalmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhathalnkmun眉|goshadhathalnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhathalmun眉|gokishadhathalmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhathalmush毛|shadhathalmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhathalnkmush毛|goshadhathalnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhathalmush毛|gokishadhathalmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhathalmuro|shadhathalmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhathalnkmuro|goshadhathalnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhathalmuro|gokishadhathalmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
